label: Search workspace for sensitive strings
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; $patterns = @('copilot@20030701','Housing@20030701','copilotwangyufengbee','housingportalwyf'); foreach ($p in $patterns) { Write-Host 'SEARCHING:' $p; $res = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern $p -SimpleMatch -List; if ($res) { $res | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim()) } } else { Write-Host 'No matches for' $p } }"
